headline: How PNL grew organic clicks 266% in 6 months by publishing 30 AI-optimized blog posts monthly
result: PNL increased monthly organic clicks from 433 to 1,150 (+266%) and ranking keywords from 913 to 3,708 (+406%) within six months, with 2,158 clicks directly attributed to WP SEO AI content.
summary: PNL is a B2B foundation engineering specialist offering screw pile solutions as an eco-friendly alternative to traditional concrete foundations. The company faced stagnant organic traffic despite quality products and technical expertise, lacking the internal SEO capacity to capture high-intent B2B traffic during the awareness phase of the buyer's journey. By partnering with WP SEO AI to publish 30 targeted blog posts monthly, PNL achieved a 266% increase in organic clicks and positioned itself as a topical authority—with content now cited by Google AI Overview and ChatGPT.
objections: B2B sector, nobody searches for our services
Our sector is too technical or complex for AI content
Trust-sensitive sector where mistakes are not allowed
We already do Google Ads, why also SEO
pdfFile: Traffic drop panic - PNL - Success case.pdf

headline: From no SEO strategy to 4,389 monthly clicks in 6 months
result: Organic traffic grew from around 200 to 4,389 monthly clicks in just six months, with 94% of March traffic generated by WP SEO AI and traffic worth €30,880.
summary: ProfOrg is an established Germany-based provider of corporate immigration and global mobility services who wanted to build online visibility from scratch instead of relying on inconsistent marketing. WP SEO AI developed a scalable SEO strategy around high-intent search topics, helping ProfOrg build authority in both traditional search and AI-driven results.
objections: We already do Google Ads, why also SEO
pdfFile: Generative Search First Movers - ProfOrg - Success case (ENGLISH).pdf

headline: Industrial equipment company grows from zero blog output to 480 monthly clicks across 4 websites
result: Imperial Valve grew from 1 to 328 monthly SEO AI clicks in just over a year, with total organic traffic increasing from 179 to 480 monthly clicks across all four DGF Group websites. In the latest month, WP SEO AI content accounted for 68.3% of all organic clicks.
summary: DGF Group BV operates four specialized industrial webshops including Imperial Valve, manufacturing high-pressure valves, manifolds, and instrumentation solutions for the oil, gas, and energy industries. With a small team managing multiple technical brands, they had zero blog output and limited online visibility despite knowing content marketing would drive B2B inquiries. WP SEO AI implemented a multilingual content strategy across all four websites, automatically publishing technical content about gas meters, control valves, and turnkey solutions, resulting in 273% traffic growth and increased international inquiries.
objections: B2B sector, nobody searches for our services
Our sector is too technical or complex for AI content
Trust-sensitive sector where mistakes are not allowed
We already do Google Ads, why also SEO

headline: Healthcare training company achieves 172% organic growth in 10 months
result: Organic clicks grew from 149 to 405 monthly clicks (+171.8%) in 10 months, with WP SEO AI content generating 54% of organic traffic and €2,750 worth of traffic value.
summary: Facet Trainingen provides specialized training for healthcare and special education professionals, focusing on aggression prevention and challenging behavior management. The owner-led company needed to grow beyond its existing network and attract new clients online while maintaining current relationships, but lacked the time and SEO capacity as a small operation with limited resources. WP SEO AI created a focused content strategy around aggression prevention and challenging behavior, delivering 130 targeted posts that helped them achieve #1 rankings for aggression prevention and gain visibility in Google AI Overviews.
objections: Trust-sensitive sector where mistakes are not allowed
We get everything from word of mouth
We already do Google Ads, why also SEO
pdfFile: Efficiency Gap - Facet Trainingen - Success case.pdf
